verification.subject: Your OTP Verification Code for MKHE
verification.instruction: To complete your registration, please enter the OTP code below:
verification.footer:
Sent at: {time}
This code expires in 15 minutes. Please do not share this code.
verification.noShare: Do not share this code with anyone.

resetPassword.subject: Reset Your Password at MKHE
resetPassword.instruction: We received a request to reset your password.
resetPassword.footer:
Sent at: {time}
If you did not request this, please ignore this email.
resetPassword.ignored: If you did not request this, ignore this email.

blockAccount.subject: Account Locked Notification from MKHE
blockAccount.accountLocked: Your account has been locked for the following reason:
blockAccount.support: If you believe this is a mistake, please contact MKHE support team.

changePassword.subject: OTP Code to Change Your Password at MKHE
changePassword.instruction: We received a request to change your account password. Please enter the OTP code below to verify your identity:
changePassword.footer:
Sent at: {time}
This code expires in 10 minutes. If you did not request this change, please secure your account immediately.
changePassword.ignored: If you did not request this, please change your password immediately or contact support.
